title: melicope lauterbachii
intro: Melicope lauterbachii, also known as the Hawaiian yellowwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Melicope lauterbachii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and used for various health purposes.
